steps.title: Translate the bounds into inequalities
steps.content:
The minimum recorded rate was 0.6 inches per hour, which means $s \geq 0.6$.
The maximum recorded rate was 1.8 inches per hour, which means $s \leq 1.8$.
Since $s$ is a recorded rate during this snowstorm, it must satisfy both conditions simultaneously.

steps.title: Combine into a compound inequality
steps.content:
When $s$ must be at least 0.6 AND at most 1.8, we write:
$$0.6 \leq s \leq 1.8$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
